dp_robin_encounter.strong: You walked over gently — that takes real heart.
dp_robin_encounter.partial: Waiting can be okay too. Want to try saying hello?
dp_robin_encounter.poor: Everyone feels unsure sometimes. Let's try a kind hello together.
dp_robin_encounter.timeout: Take your time. I'm right here with you.
dp_robin_encounter.safety: Let's keep our adventure safe and kind. A grown-up can help if you need.

dp_robin_ladder.strong: You said the scared part out loud — that helps it feel smaller.
dp_robin_ladder.partial: It's okay to want a different plan. Robin still needs a friend nearby.
dp_robin_ladder.poor: Let's try again. Robin's feelings matter — we can go slower together.
dp_robin_ladder.timeout: No rush. Feelings are big sometimes — we can sit with that.
dp_robin_ladder.safety: If something feels really hard, a trusted grown-up can help. You're not alone.

dp_climb_celebration.strong: You did it! Robin climbed because you believed in them.
dp_climb_celebration.partial: One more step — you've got this!
dp_climb_celebration.poor: Every try counts. Let's tap together!
dp_climb_celebration.safety: You're safe here. A grown-up is always there if you need extra help.

dp_leftout_bench.strong: You made room for Jamie — belonging starts with one kind invite.
dp_leftout_bench.partial: Sitting nearby helps. A short invitation can open the door even more.
dp_leftout_bench.poor: We can turn back and try a welcome. Friendship grows in the retry.
dp_leftout_bench.timeout: Noticing is the first step. I'm with you.
dp_leftout_bench.safety: If loneliness feels too big, a trusted grown-up can help.

dp_ask_grownup.strong: Asking a grown-up for help is brave — that keeps everyone safer.
dp_ask_grownup.partial: Starting small is okay. Sharing with a grown-up is another brave option.
dp_ask_grownup.poor: Hurts shouldn't stay secret. Trusted grown-ups are part of the team.
dp_ask_grownup.timeout: You can take your time choosing what to share.
dp_ask_grownup.safety: Hard feelings get help. You're not alone.

dp_hothead_calm.strong: Breathing first gives big feelings a soft landing.
dp_hothead_calm.partial: Space can be kind — checking back later completes the care.
dp_hothead_calm.poor: Shame heats anger up. Calm words help the fire cool.
dp_hothead_calm.timeout: Big feelings need a minute. I'm right here.
dp_hothead_calm.safety: If anger feels unsafe, find a trusted grown-up right away.

dp_friendship_repair.strong: Repair restores belonging — that was a strong friendship move.
dp_friendship_repair.partial: Timing matters. Keeping the door open is still friendship.
dp_friendship_repair.poor: Exclusion isn't repair. Let's try a kinder invitation.
dp_friendship_repair.timeout: Friendships can pause and restart gently.
dp_friendship_repair.safety: If a conflict still hurts, a grown-up can help you both.
